name: patch-the-web
description: Author safe, domain-scoped community repairs and missing features for websites with Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Author safe, tested community web features
interface.longDescription: Turn a concrete website complaint or missing capability into a constrained Patch the Web repair, validate every selector and permission, and prove the behavior with browser tests before publication.
defaultPrompt: Use Patch the Web to repair this inaccessible form.
Create a safe mobile-layout patch for this page.
Add private filters to this service directory.
Add a safe comparison workflow to this directory.
Check whether this Patch the Web still works.
